_comment: vlog-planner config. Copy to config.json and edit. Everything defaults to FREE / no-key. Fill a key only to upgrade a single data source; the skill keeps working without any.
_region_help: auto | china | international. Controls default providers, output language and the data-quality notes printed in the manual.
_language_help: Output + geocoding language, e.g. zh-CN or en.

weather._provider_help: open-meteo (free, no key, global) | qweather (China, needs key) | openweather (global, needs key)
weather._qweather_help: base = 你在 console.qweather.com/setting 拿到的【专属 API Host】(如 abcxyz.qweatherapi.com)。老的 devapi.qweather.com 共享域名 2026 起停用，别再用。key 直接填 API KEY。

geocode._provider_help: nominatim (free, no key) | amap (China, far better POI/road data, needs key)
geocode._amap_help: 高德 key 必须选【服务平台=Web服务】那一类，且账号需【实名认证】才有免费额度；console.amap.com 创建。geocode/poi 共用同一个 Web服务 key。

poi._provider_help: overpass (free OSM, patchy in China) | amap (needs key) | none (only use the route you give)

sun._provider_help: Always local astronomy math. No key, works offline, identical worldwide.

planning._read_by: shootable_threshold + daily_window 由 plan.py 读取；max_spots_per_day / pace / prefer_golden_hour 由 Claude 在排日程时参考（SKILL.md 步骤 1-2），脚本不直接读。
planning._shootable_threshold_help: [plan.py] lenient = 除非完全没法拍都拍 | balanced = 给差光/大雨的点打 plan B | strict = 只推荐强光晴朗窗口
planning._daily_window_help: [plan.py] 白天兜底拍摄窗口的边界（黄金时刻之外）。
planning._pace_help: [Claude] relaxed | normal | packed — 每天排几个点/赶不赶。
planning._prefer_golden_hour_help: [Claude] 排序时是否优先把点安排到黄金时刻。

style._vibe_help: Free text mood that flavors the A-roll/B-roll suggestions, e.g. 治愈 / 史诗感 / citywalk / 复古胶片.
